response.original_title: Revista de la Compañía Internacional Cinematográfica
response.overview: Second attempt at producing a regularly appearing newsreel. The previous attempt was the so-called Cinema Theater Magazine, later called National Magazine, which appeared in 1910.  It contains: a scavenger hunt at the Barranco baths; a reception hosted by Mr. Manuel Quimper's political friends at the Zoological Park restaurant; a workers' demonstration in honor of their candidate, Mr. Espinoza, for the congressional seat; luncheon at the Grand Hotel; an agricultural festival at the Chacra Cerro estate; details of the recent political elections; and the funeral of the commander of the Roma Fire Brigade.
response.title: Revista de la Compañía Internacional Cinematográfica
